creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
edwin@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Synopsis: [ERROR] cannot portupgrade editors/koffice-kde4 to version 2.3.3_2
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->kde
> Responsible-Changed-By: edwin
> Responsible-Changed-When: Mon Jul 18 07:40:29 UTC 2011
> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> Over to maintainer (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)

Were you actually able to build koffice before? The latest commit to it
did not touch this part of the code at all.

I can see some other PRs with the same error, such as ports/157086. Did
you previously have binutils installed or something like that?
